description_long: This object consists of two dark-colored pillows positioned next to each other, both with a slightly irregular, plush form. The pillows have a textured fabric surface that appears to be woven, giving them a tactile, cozy look. Their shapes are somewhat asymmetrical, with visible creases and folds that suggest softness and flexibility. The color is a deep charcoal gray, and the surface has a matte, slightly rough finish. There are no visible patterns, logos, or tags on the exterior. The pillows are shown isolated, with no surrounding context or furniture.
description: Two dark gray, textured pillows with a soft, plush appearance and a matte, woven surface.
description_view_0: Two pillows are visible side by side, showing their full, plush forms and textured surfaces.
description_view_1: The front pillow is seen head-on, with its pointed top and creased sides most prominent.
description_view_2: The pillows are viewed from an angle, highlighting their depth and the way they lean against each other.
description_view_3: A side view of the pillows, emphasizing the curved, soft profile and the pointed top of one pillow.
